notes: UNICEF Inform (data.inform.unicef.org) is built on the Ona/onadata platform, which exposes no OpenAPI document. Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the Ona API docs, matching the exact paths the adaptor calls (confirmed in dist/index.cjs): forms, forms/{id}, forms/{id}/form.json, data/{id}, data/{id}/{submissionId}, media/{id}. Field sets for Form, Submission and Attachment come from the Ona docs; Submission uses additionalProperties since form field keys are form-specific.
